sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63521" key="lipo/qroos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῐπό-θροος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n63521.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wanting voice, mute</tr_>, of Echo, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2045.tlg001.perseus-grc1:4:327" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.327</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
